market_pulse: Competitive venue lineup active this weekend: LIV Beach features Tiësto (6/20) and Kromi, while XS books Chainsmokers (6/13) and Kaskade (6/12), and OMNIA features Steve Aoki (6/12) and Lavern (6/13).

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily using countdown-to-weekend/event stories (OMNIA Dayclub, TAO Beach, Encore Beach). LIV has opportunity to amplify Friday/Saturday countdown storytelling.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 24-hour countdown story series for Friday events on @livbeachlasvegas and @livnightclub with interactive stickers

content_gaps.description: Competitors driving more follower-generated content (reels, boomerangs). LIV posting is more official/polished vs. grassroots user participation.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create branded hashtag campaign #LIVMoments and incentivize UGC with weekly features/shoutouts

content_gaps.description: TAO and Hakkasan posting more BTS setup/preparation content. LIV's BTS is minimal compared to competitors.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film staff/setup content for both Beach and Nightclub venues, highlight DJ tech setup and bartender skills
